title: Sovereign Trust Insurance Plc Holds 30th AGM Meeting with Investors - FinancialEDGE
description: Sovereign Trust Insurance Plc recently held its 30th Annual General Meeting (AGM) with its investors in Lagos, where shareholders approved a total dividend of N711.4 million, representing 5k per 50kobo ordinary share. html:
Sovereign Trust Insurance Plc recently held its 30th Annual General Meeting (AGM) with its investors in Lagos, where shareholders approved a total dividend of N711.4 million, representing 5k per 50kobo ordinary share.

The event featured key representatives from the company, including Segun Bankole, Deputy General Manager of Corporate Communication & Investor Relations.

The meeting demonstrates Sovereign Trust Insurance Plc’s commitment to maintaining strong relationships with its investors and keeping them informed about the company’s performance.

The dividend payout highlights the company’s focus on rewarding its investors and sharing its financial success.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project  Director Financial Edge and Segun Bankole: Deputy General Manager Corporate Communication & Investors Relations, Sovereign Trust Insurance Plc at the company 30th Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Lagos.
